value_chain_position: Hybrid cloud infrastructure software — sells hyperconverged infrastructure (HCI) software and cloud management platform that virtualizes compute, storage, and networking for on-prem and multi-cloud AI/enterprise workloads.
relative_comps: NTNX is the leading independent HCI software vendor, competing against Broadcom's VMware (the dominant incumbent post-acquisition) which is driving customers to NTNX as VMware pricing escalates. This VMware displacement tailwind is the primary growth driver (13% YoY, accelerating). FCF margin of 28% on $2.75B revenue is solid. NTNX is not an AI infrastructure frontline name but benefits as AI workloads require hybrid cloud orchestration. The load-bearing score reflects genuine switching costs once deployed but susceptibility to hyperscaler commoditization of on-prem infrastructure over a 5-year horizon.
